10507970.title: Through Your Eyes
10507970.description: In the region of Guangxi in China Sophie meets some of the world's oldest farming people, Zhuangfolket. Among the bamboo forests and risterasser she learns an old fashioned way of life. Even the villagers get to experience something new.
